reviews.review_description: It's a good game, inmersive and funny, but my wife can't play it because it doesn't have teleport and gets sick. Me also, a little less, but I think it would be an easy modification and very useful for other people.

a good escape game can be hard to find but aside from a few minor issues that have been fed back to the developer, this is absolutely one of the better ones out there! i didn't find any game-breaking bugs and I did look (I may have possibly generated infinite money trying to break the game and still it kept on going) I fully recommend this game as a great way to kill a few hours in VR

Had the chance to play the game right through to the end and my thoughts were " yes please" and "sir can I have some more " the graphic style used is fantastic and  reminds me of  the old comic book style adventures you could read as a kid. The controls were a big hit and a miss with point and teleport in the direction you want to go , but since playing this has been updated by the Dev team.The puzzles within the game get your mind thinking but not to hard that you can't enjoy them and the environment your in.If you like puzzle, Indiana Jones style games this is one for you .

Here is my gameplay video of the game for you to enjoy.


https://youtu.be/ZtOh0EJCVUo
https://youtu.be/pY10twJcebg

Into the third room at this point and The visuals are really nice but there are definitely some glitches at this point. Sometimes it is difficult to pick up items and get them into your inventory. Likewise, it can also be difficult to retrieve items form your inventory once they are there. Sometimes when you grab the lantern it is really tiny in Your hand instead of being full size and often it drops to the floor as opposed to going back to inventory. Seated play doesn’t really work (although it states it supports it) as you have to physically turn your body to move in a particular direction with the the sticks (no turning left or right with the controllers?? ) which is a little odd. Overall this game has amazing potential but locomotion and object physics need to be improved. Also movement speed is very slow and with the necessity to move between rooms it can be a bit tedious.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the bug reports.  I'll take a look at them.  For seated play, if you turn on console movement you get flick turning.

reviews.review_description: This was so much fun. Controls were awkward to get used to but I still had fun.

Its nice game but walking in game is so slow and i missing snap turn settings (its default by 90 degrees? i need less -like 45 degrees)
Add faster moove or run capability + turning settings and its 5 star for me!
EDIT: 5 stars for me now.  
Its so much better now!  Thank you. 
Runing speed is optional now - Good work
Turning can be set by 90 or 45 degrees now - Enough for me. Anyways some peoples prefering smaller angle like 30 ( maybe it can be set like runing speed? )

btw can i turn off smooth turning somewhere? (I can turn by 45 degrees now but when i hold my stick just abit longer its not snap turning but starts to turning continuously and so much peoples feels bad like this (got nausea))

reviews.review_title: Good game, but you need hints
reviews.review_description:
It is a good escape room game, but it should give you hints, like in The Room Vr.
If you don‘t want them you can turn them off. I know people that gave the game back, 
because they got stuck in the midfle of the game.
Is there a plan to do teleportation. I got sick after 30 Minutes.
a good game of puzzles with very colorful graphics however it happened that I struggled on some of them, a solution option proposed by the developers would be welcome. good game everyone😉

developer_response.body: At lot of people have asked for hints so we are looking to implement them in some fashion. Look for an update soon.

reviews.review_description:
The console direction turning needs to be in smaller steps like 30 degrees maybe. Adding settings for smooth turning would be great. Settings to adjust speed of walking would also help. 

I’m also not entirely sure what I’m supposed to be doing as I don’t see any hints? But maybe that’s part of the appeal. 

The graphics are really nice though.

developer_response.body:
There is an update coming that has the ability to adjust snap turns to 45 degrees instead of 90 and allows you to adjust the walk speed.  Should be out shortly.

There are puzzle hints.  For example, sitting on the altar in the first room is a stone tablet (spoiler: there are 3 in that room) that describes the first puzzle.  But it's an escape room :) figuring it out is the fun.

reviews.review_description: Ok well I lov escape games but this was a cross between escape game and I expect u to die mor then escape. Controls were hard to get used to and not really sur why I found a bunch of things but only found 1 out of 6 secrets. Don't get wrong graphi s and rooms are huge amazing but just expected mor then only a chapter for a 17$ game.  Also thought it would b several puzzles n each room it was mor like one small puzzle per room so it wasn't horrible I did hav fun on the puzzle for the room just expected way mor then what I got WAY too short, so honestly would've paid maybe 7 to 10$ at most caus of lack of content hope that mor is added caus kinda bummed a tad.

Some bugs sometimes but it’s a plaisant game. But it seems have no saving function. I mean If I leave the game, it restarts at the first room and this is very boring to play the same rooms again and again. Also if I die, it would be cool to stay in the same room and not to go back in the first one. Is there improvements planned?

This COULD be a very good game. However, it is very glitchy, it crashes a lot, the settings have to be reset after every restart, or every time you die, the inventory is too clutted and items keep disappearing or going miniature, and the controls are awkward! Otherwise the game is pretty cool ;-)

Was enjoying playing this game despite all the bugs and hard to use controls until I died and  it kept spawning me to a place where it instantly killed me again so I was unable to continue the game. The only way was to restart from the begining which I didn't really want to do as I had spent a good amount of time on the game.  I did message the developers regarding this issue a few days ago but I have had no response although they have read the message. Very disappointed I am unable to finish the game.
